scripts.build: pnpm build:status && pnpm build:library && pnpm build:manager
scripts.build:library: cd services/library && go build ./... && pnpm --filter './apps/web/library/**' --if-present build
scripts.check: pnpm check:proto && pnpm check:status && pnpm check:library && pnpm check:manager
scripts.check:status: cd services/status && go vet ./... && go build ./... && cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @realtime-me/status-web check
scripts.check:library: cd services/library && go vet ./... && go build ./... && cd ../.. && pnpm --filter './apps/web/library/**' --filter './packages/library-*' --if-present typecheck
scripts.format: biome format --write services/manager tools && prettier --write 'apps/web/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,json,html}' 'packages/library-web/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,json}' 'apps/web/build/**/*.ts' && buf format -w
